name: Hero Section
description: Full-width hero with headline, subtext, CTA buttons, and optional media. Entry point for landing pages and marketing sections.

slots.headline: Primary heading, typically h1 with _heading1
slots.media: Optional image, illustration, or chart component

command-center.notes: Headline uses cc-label. CTA buttons get cc-glow on primary action. Background uses cc-grid overlay.

auradecantism.notes: Hero section on d-mesh background. Headline uses d-gradient-text. CTA button gets aura-glow.

clean.notes: Hero on subtle muted background. No gradients or glass. Standard button styling.
